Macro# kIOUSBStreamsNotSupported

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.7+

```
#define kIOUSBStreamsNotSupported
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/kiousbstreamsnotsupported#discussion)

Errors specific to the IOUSBFamily. Note that the iokit_usb_err(x) translates to 0xe0004xxx, where xxx is the value in parenthesis as a hex number.
